specific_question: In October 2024, did MediConn Solutions' human resources department propose any changes to customer service operating hours?
answer: In October 2024, the customer service director proposed extending weekend hours for MediConn Solutions' customer service representatives from 10 AM - 4 PM to 9 AM - 6 PM to serve patients better, pending budget approval for 2024 into 2025.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
